feed.title: blank
feed.subtitle: A simple, whitespace theme for academics. Based on [*folio](https://github.com/bogoli/-folio) design.

entry.title: The Aim
entry.content: Why are we having this conversation? Scientific writing takes almost the same amount of time as for the analysis. But it is more painful and admitedly boring.
entry.summary: Why are we having this conversation? Scientific writing takes almost the same amount of time as for the analysis. But it is more painful and admitedly boring.
